summary: Iteration 19: Tested all new features - 5 new admin panels (PromoBanner, BalieAbout, BalieContact, BalieInstallment, BalieGallery), mobile carousel scroll buttons, SaunaAdvantages vertical layout, PromoFeatures horizontal scroll, and API integrations. Backend: 23/23 tests pass. Frontend: All mobile carousels working with scroll buttons and peek effect. Admin tabs exist and load correctly. Components read from API.
seed_data_creation: Test data created via backend tests with TEST_ prefix for PromoBanner, BalieAbout, BalieContact, BalieInstallment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 19 features working: 1) Mobile carousels (SpecialOffer, SaunaVideoReviews, Reviews, PromoFeatures) have scroll buttons (<,>) that work correctly. 2) Peek effect visible - neighboring card edges shown on mobile (w-[72vw], w-[68vw], w-[55vw] cards). 3) SaunaAdvantages is vertical list on mobile (data-testid='advantages-mobile'), NOT horizontal carousel. 4) PromoFeatures has horizontal scroll on mobile (data-testid='promo-features-mobile-scroll'). 5) Five new admin tabs exist: САУНЫ -> Промо-баннер, КУПЕЛИ -> О нас/Контакты/Рассрочка/Галерея. 6) All admin components load correctly with data-testid attributes. 7) PromoBanner, BalieAbout, BalieContact components read from API (verified with TEST_ prefixed data). 8) Backend APIs: GET/PUT for promo-banner, balie-about, balie-contact, balie-installment all working with proper auth.

special_offer.details: Scroll buttons (data-testid='special-scroll-left/right') work, cards use w-[72vw] for peek effect

sauna_video_reviews.details: Scroll buttons (data-testid='video-scroll-left/right') work, cards use w-[68vw]

reviews.details: Scroll buttons (data-testid='reviews-scroll-left/right') work, cards use w-[72vw]

promo_features.details: Horizontal scroll on mobile (data-testid='promo-features-mobile-scroll'), scroll buttons work, cards use w-[55vw]

sauna_advantages_vertical.details: SaunaAdvantages is vertical list on mobile (data-testid='advantages-mobile'), NOT horizontal carousel - no overflow-x-auto class

promo_banner.details: Tab exists in САУНЫ group, component loads with data-testid='promo-banner-admin'

balie_about.details: Tab exists in КУПЕЛИ group (О нас), component loads with data-testid='balie-about-admin'

balie_contact.details: Tab exists in КУПЕЛИ group (Контакты), component loads with data-testid='balie-contact-admin'

balie_installment.details: Tab exists in КУПЕЛИ group (Рассрочка), component loads with data-testid='balie-installment-admin'

balie_gallery.details: Tab exists in КУПЕЛИ group (Галерея), component loads with data-testid='balie-gallery-admin'

promo_banner_api.details: GET /api/settings/promo-banner returns data, PUT requires auth, PromoBanner component reads from API

balie_about_api.details: GET /api/settings/balie-about returns data, PUT requires auth, BalieAbout component reads from API

balie_contact_api.details: GET /api/settings/balie-contact returns phone/email/address, PUT requires auth, BalieContact component reads from API

balie_installment_api.details: GET /api/settings/balie-installment returns items array, PUT requires auth
